## MVP Feature Checklist

### Core Features
- [ ] Video/audio file import (MP4, WebM, WAV)
- [ ] Whisper transcription integration
- [ ] Transcript display with timestamps
- [ ] Click-to-jump playback functionality
- [ ] Delete lines → export via FFmpeg

### Stretch Goals
- [ ] Basic silence detection
- [ ] Simple waveform view
- [ ] Auto-subtitle export (.srt)
